summary: Phase 3.A.1 (drift-detection sweep — first commit of Phase 3.A) complete. The Phase 2.A code-review carry-forwards explicitly tagged 'land before any net-new src/sim/** code' have landed: (N7) decodeBase64Url + B64URL_REVERSE relocated from src/mapgen/serialize.ts to src/core/hash.ts alongside the existing base64url encoder; error-message prefix renamed from parseFloor: to decodeBase64Url: per the Phase 3.0 addendum's red-team-followup carry-forward; src/mapgen/serialize.ts now imports decodeBase64Url from core/hash; focused unit tests added in src/core/hash.test.ts covering all r mod 4 ∈ {0, 2, 3} branches plus the r === 1 reject path plus invalid-character path (`+`, `/`, `=`) plus high-codepoint path (`☃`) plus empty-string round-trip plus a 50-seed PRNG-driven property round-trip — lifting 100% line/branch/function coverage on src/core/hash.ts independent of any src/mapgen/** transitive coverage. (N3) tests/tools/gen-fixtures.test.ts added (new file) covering fixturePathFor slug-rejection branches across 7 invalid characters + happy-path acceptance + .ascii extension, generatePair determinism + JSON round-trip + ASCII trailing-newline contract + cross-seed differentiation, and readManifest shape validation (pairs array + per-entry seed/floor type checks). docs/PHASES.md updated to formally split Phase 3 into Phase 3.0 (planning gate, already approved), Phase 3.A.1 (this commit — drift-detection sweep), Phase 3.A.2 (sim implementation, next), and Phase 3.B (live verification, after 3.A.2 push) with original Phase 3 acceptance criteria partitioned across the four subphases. docs/ARCHITECTURE.md gains a new 'Phase 3 frozen contracts' section between the placeholder-ruleset block and the build-time-constants section, listing all 13 frozen contracts from the Phase 3.0 addendum (action vocabulary, roll-derivation function with the icefall:roll:v1: anchor, roll-domain registry, combat damage formula, player-id pin, turn order, AI zero-PRNG/zero-roll, streams.simFloor accessor, per-tick __consumed-empty + floor-entry delta, RunState.outcome set, MAX_LOS_RADIUS=8, SIM_DIGEST golden constant, damage-clamp + short-circuit) plus the two deferred contracts (one-way descent, verifier trailing-after-terminal). Phase 3.A.2 implementation may begin in the next phase cycle.
suggested_commit_message: phase-3.A.1: drift-detection sweep (decoder relocation + N3 test + ARCHITECTURE.md frozen contracts)

verification_sprint.purpose: Confirm Phase 2 (2.0 + 2.A + 2.B) foundation has not drifted before opening Phase 3 sim implementation in 3.A.2.
verification_sprint.unit_tests: 443 passed (vitest run --coverage); was 411 at HEAD of Phase 2.B, +32 net-new in 3.A.1 (15 decodeBase64Url focused tests + 17 gen-fixtures tests). 100% lines / 100% statements / 100% functions on src/core/**, src/mapgen/**, src/registries/**. Branch coverage on src/core/hash.ts = 100% (the N7 deliverable's stated coverage-lift goal).
verification_sprint.build: vite build — green; dist/assets/index-BPH9C9SR.js = 29.29 KB raw / 11.80 KB gzipped (well under the 75 KB Phase 2.0 budget; 84% headroom). No new chunks introduced.
verification_sprint.primary_workflow: Phase 3.A.1 ships no user-facing code (drift-detection sweep posture); the primary workflow remains the live https://porkchop.github.io/icefall/ diagnostic page with the Phase 2.A floor-preview UI, last verified green in commit 394801f per Phase 2.B approval. Phase 3.A.2 will extend the diagnostic page with a scripted-playthrough button (memo decision 10); Phase 3.B will re-verify it live.

N7_decoder_relocation.evidence: src/core/hash.ts:52-58 (B64URL_REVERSE) + 62-67 (b64urlLookup, hoisted from per-call closure per code-review N1) + 70-110 (decodeBase64Url with renamed error prefix). src/mapgen/serialize.ts:17 imports decodeBase64Url from ../core/hash. The pre-relocation local copies (B64URL_REVERSE IIFE + decodeBase64Url + nested lookup at serialize.ts:395-444 in the Phase 2.B baseline) are removed; only the new core/hash.ts location holds the implementation. Verified by Grep for B64URL_REVERSE — only matches in src/core/hash.ts and src/core/hash.test.ts.

N7_focused_unit_tests.evidence: src/core/hash.test.ts:71-152 — 15 new tests under describe('decodeBase64Url'): empty (r=0 trivial), r=2 with literal '_w', r=3 with literal '__8', r=0 full-quad with '____', r=1 reject ('AAAAA'), invalid character +, /, = (padding), high-codepoint (☃), empty round-trip, 1-byte round-trip (r=2), 2-byte round-trip (r=3), 3-byte round-trip (r=0 full quad), 32-byte SHA-256 digest round-trip, and a 50-seed property round-trip drawing both length (mod 100) and bytes from a deterministic streamPrng(rootSeed, 'test:b64'). Coverage report confirms 100% lines/branches/functions on src/core/hash.ts independent of src/mapgen/** transitive coverage.

N3_gen_fixtures_unit_test.evidence: tests/tools/gen-fixtures.test.ts — 17 tests: fixturePathFor (8 tests covering slug rejection on _, ., whitespace, path-traversal, high-codepoint, plus happy paths for json/ascii extensions and ASCII alnum+hyphen seeds), generatePair (6 tests covering happy path, determinism for identical inputs, divergence for different seeds, JSON round-trip via parseFloor, ASCII trailing-newline contract from Phase 2.A addendum N3, slug-validation propagation), readManifest (3 tests covering shape validation + per-entry seed/floor types). Tests pass under the existing tests/**/*.ts ESLint relaxation (eslint.config.js:220-226).

PHASES_md_split.evidence: docs/PHASES.md:80-184 — formal split with acceptance criteria for Phase 3.0 (planning gate, requires decision memo + red-team + addendum + follow-up red-team approval), Phase 3.A.1 (this commit — drift-detection sweep with 5 specific deliverables), Phase 3.A.2 (sim implementation with 6 specific acceptance criteria from the original Phase 3 acceptance + the addendum's frozen-contract regression-test gate), and Phase 3.B (live verification with 2 acceptance criteria covering the deployed scripted-playthrough button + cross-runtime Playwright on the new sim assertions).

ARCHITECTURE_md_phase_3_frozen_contracts.evidence: docs/ARCHITECTURE.md:292-421 — new 'Phase 3 frozen contracts (entity model, turn loop, combat)' section. Lists all 13 frozen contracts from the Phase 3.0 addendum: action type vocabulary (4 strings), roll-derivation function (full byte-explicit pre-image with the 'icefall:roll:v1:' anchor), roll-domain registry (combat:atk-bonus + combat:counter-bonus), combat damage formula (max(1, atk-def+bonus) with low-bit AND mask), player entity id pinned to 0, turn order (ascending id, one chain advance per player action), monster AI zero-PRNG/zero-roll with N/E/S/W/NE/SE/SW/NW direction list and y-southward coordinate system, streams.simFloor(floorN) accessor with [1..10] runtime range and non-collision proof, per-tick __consumed-empty invariant + floor-entry delta of {mapgen:N, sim:N} via the harness's exception, RunState.outcome ∈ {running, dead, won}, MAX_LOS_RADIUS=8 BFS-step integer sentinel, SIM_DIGEST golden constant, plus deferred contracts (one-way descent, verifier trailing-after-terminal canonicalization to Phase 8).

verification.code_review: artifacts/code-review-phase-3-A-1.md (verdict APPROVE WITH NITS, no blockers; reviewer N1+N2 folded into commit, reviewer N3+N4+N5 recorded as cosmetic Phase 3.A.2 carry-forwards).
verification.qa_playwright_status: Phase 3.A.1 ships no user-facing changes (no diagnostic-page edit, no UI surface change). qa-playwright is not invoked at this gate; Phase 3.B will exercise the cross-runtime Playwright job on the deployed scripted-playthrough button after Phase 3.A.2 lands.

from_phase_3_0_addendum_red_team_followu: uniform_index_integer_only: Decision N6's uniformIndex must be expressed in integer-only ops; pseudocode in the addendum uses Math.floor and / which are banned by src/sim/**'s no-float-arithmetic rule. Implementer's choice of integer-division idiom (or a new src/core/math.idiv helper) lands in Phase 3.A.2.

harness_mapgen_exception_carry_to_phase_5: When Phase 5's input-driven loop replaces runScripted, relocate the harness's generateFloor + spawnFloorEntities orchestration to src/run/loop.ts (or equivalent) and remove the eslint single-file exception for src/sim/harness.ts. Add to the Phase 5 deliverable list when Phase 5 planning begins. The exception itself is established in Phase 3.A.2's eslint.config.js edits.
from_phase_3_A_1_code_review: code_review_N3: gen-fixtures process.env.VITEST test is an implicit existence-check, not a direct guard test. Acceptable for 3.A.1; a stronger version (mock mkdirSync and assert no fixture-file mtime changed) is a touch-up if the file is edited in 3.A.2.

code_review_N4: Test name 'propagates the slug-validation error … via the path helper used downstream by main()' overstates the test's actual surface (only invokes fixturePathFor). Rename to 'fixturePathFor rejects slash characters' if the test file is touched.
code_review_N5: JSDoc on decodeBase64Url cites addendum B6 but not the test file path. Optional cosmetic addition.

next_phase: Phase 3.A.2 — Entity Model, Turn Loop, Combat (sandbox-verifiable sim implementation). Per the Phase 3.0 addendum's frozen-contract list and the per-decision specifications in the memo body, 3.A.2 lands: src/sim/types.ts (RunState, FloorState, Player, Monster, FloorItem, MonsterAIState), src/sim/params.ts (MAX_LOS_RADIUS=8), src/sim/combat.ts (rollBytes/rollU32 with the icefall:roll:v1: anchor + Math.max-clamped damage application + short-circuit on death), src/sim/ai.ts (BFS-from-player with the 8-direction tiebreak + integer sentinel return), src/sim/turn.ts (tick — pure, zero-streams), src/sim/run.ts (RunState construction + outcome transitions + pending-floor-entry flag on descend), src/sim/harness.ts (runScripted with explicit floor-entry block — the only file in src/sim/** allowed to import generateFloor, with the eslint single-file exception), src/sim/self-test-log.ts (SELF_TEST_LOG_100 + SELF_TEST_INPUTS), src/registries/monsters.ts (~6 monster kinds + boss per memo decision 12), src/registries/items.ts (5 items per memo decision 13 — data-only, no inventory mechanics in 3.A.2), src/core/streams.ts simFloor extension (with [1..10] runtime range validation per addendum B4), src/core/self-test.ts SIM_DIGEST golden constant + sim-cross-runtime-digest + sim-stream-isolation checks, eslint.config.js src/sim/** lint-scope additions (member-access bans on .mapgen/.ui/.sim no-arg + destructuring escape selectors + harness exception per addendum N3), src/main.ts diagnostic-page scripted-playthrough section (memo decision 10) with window.__SIM_FINAL_STATE_HASH__ + window.__SIM_OUTCOME__ flags, tests/sim/* coverage, tests/registries/items.test.ts + monsters.test.ts, tests/e2e/diagnostic.spec.ts extended with 2 new sim assertions. Phase 3.A.2 acceptance gate per docs/PHASES.md: npm ci && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:e2e all green inside the sandbox + 100% line/branch/function coverage on src/core/**, src/mapgen/**, src/sim/**, src/registries/**. Phase 3.B (live verification) is a separate phase per memo decision 14.
